components.description: Interactive element with a text label and optional leading/trailing icon slots. Has contained (filled), outlined (border), and ghost (text-only) types.
Square icon-only button for actions where space is limited. No label — icon communicates the action. Has contained, outlined, and ghost types.
Minimal button that appears as clickable text with no container. No background, border, or border-radius — state is communicated by text color. Has optional leading/trailing icon slots.

Icon-only visual sub-component of a checkbox. Renders unchecked, checked, or indeterminate state using Material Symbols Outlined icons. No label — intended to be composed inside a full Checkbox component.
